title: Collar Powers (Wolfs)
description: A simple datapack that makes it the wolf's color may give the wolf either a permenant potion effect or power!
body:
# 📢Announcement 
all future updates will be in a new datapack $soon teo be released.

# Description
Collar Power is a datapack that aims to make pets, specificly wolfs more used in asventures with the player.

by allowing the wolfs to gain unique buffs, the player maybe more tempted to allow there new found friend to be new found ally!

### Note:
- All wolfs when first tamed will have there color changed from red to white, so players dont immediately get a power with out doing anything.

## Collar Powers!
- White = Nothing
- Light Gray = Slowness Immunity (to all Players in a 2 block Radius and it self)
- Gray = Resistance I
- Black = Darkness and Blindness Immunity (to all Players in a 2 block Radius)
- Brown = Wither Immunity (to all Players in a 2 block Radius and it self)
- Red = +1 Attack Damage
- Orange = Fire Resistance V
- Yellow = Haste II (to all Players in a 2 block Radius)
- Lime = Luck I (to all Players in a 2 block Radius)
- Green = Poison Immunity (to all Players in a 2 block Radius and it self)
- Cyan = Water Breathing X
- Light Blue = +0.05 Movement Speed
- Blue = +0.5 Water Movement Efficiency
- Purple = +0.15 Movement Speed (When in the **End** Dimension)
- Magenta = +1.5 Attack Damage (When in the **End** Dimension)
- Pink = Regeneration II


## Configs
You will be able to change how frequent all of the wolfs give the effects to 

### For Slowness Immunity

```
/scoreboard players set %Config Slowness_Immunity_Interval <Number>
```


### For Darkness or Blindness Immunity

```
/scoreboard players set %Config Darkness_or_Blindness_Immunity_Interval <Number>
```


### For WIther Immunity

```
/scoreboard players set %Config Wither_Immunity_Interval <Number>
```


### For Haste Buff

```
/scoreboard players set %Config Haste_Buff_Interval <Number>
```


### For Luck Buff

```
/scoreboard players set %Config Luck_Buff_Interval <Number>
```


### For Poison Immunity

```
/scoreboard players set %Config Poison_Immunity_Interval <Number>
```



## If you would like to reset the Config Intervals, you can use this Command:

```
/scoreboard players add Collar_Power+Tags Collar_Power+Tags 1
```
